QueryEipList.ipVersion: IP version of the EIP to query, ipv4 or ipv6, default is ipv4.
QueryEipList.eip: EIP to query, including IPv4 and IPv6 EIPs. To query a specific IPv6 EIP, set ipVersion to ipv6.
QueryEipList.instanceType: Bound instance type. Valid values: BCC, BBC, DCC, ENI, BLB, NAT, VPN.
QueryEipList.instanceId: Short ID of the bound instance. If specified, instanceType must also be provided.
QueryEipList.name: Name of the EIP to query.
QueryEipList.status: Instance status. Only supports: available, binded, paused.
QueryEipList.eipIds: EIP short ID(s). Supports single or multiple EIP IDs separated by commas.
QueryEipList.marker: Starting position for paginated queries, a system-generated string.
QueryEipList.maxKeys: Maximum number of results per page, up to 1000. Default is 1000.
